folio.label: 55v
folio.l: At Cristemasse , merie may ©e daunce
¢ ñe seken lond and see , for ©oure wynnynges
As wyse folk ©e knowen , alle the estat´
Of regnes , ©e ben fadres of tidynges
And tales , bothe of pees and of debat´
I were rigút now , of tales desolat´
Ner that a Marchau~t , gon is many a ©ere
Me taugút a tale , whicú æ ©e shal here
¢ In Surrye whilom , dwelled a companye
Of chapmen riche , and ther to sad & trewe
That wyde where , senten here spicerye
Clothes of gold , of satyn , riche of hewe
Here chaffare was so thrifty , & so newe
That euäy wygút , hath deynte to chaffare
Witú hem , & eke to sellen hem here ware
¢ Now fel it , æat the maistres of æat sorte
Han shapen hem , to Rome for to wende
Were it for chapmanhod , or for disport
Non other message , wold they thidder sende
But comen hem selue , to Rome , this is the ende
And in swicú place , as thougút hem auauntage
For here entente , they take here herbergage
¢ Soiourned han theise Marchauntz , in that toun
A certeyne tyme , as fel to here plesaunce
And so byfel , that the excellent renoun
Of the Em¹oures dougúter , Dame Custaunce
Reported was , witú euäy circu~staunce
Vn to theise Surryen Marchauntz , in swicú a wyse
Fro day to day , as I shal ©ow deuyse
¢ This was the comune voys , of euäy man
Oure Em¹oure of Rome , god hi~ se
A dougúter hatú , that syn the world bygan
To rekne as wel hire goodnesse , as beaute
Nas neuäe swicú a nother , as is she
I preye to god in honour , hire sustene
And wolde she were , of al Europe the Quene
¢ In hire is heigú beaute , witú outen pride
ñouthe with outen greenheede , or of folye
To alle hire werkes , vertu is hire gyde
Humblesse hath slayn in hire , al tirannye
She is myrour , of al curteisye
Hir herte is verrey chaumbre , of holynesse
Hir , and Ministre , of freedom , for almesse
¢ And al this voys was sotú , as god is trewe
But now to purpos , lat vs turne a gayne
Theise Marchauntz han don fraugút , here sheppes newe
